items.title: EU border delays 'not bearable' over summer, warns airport boss
items.dek: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.
items.body: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: China says pilot crashed small plane into skyscraper for 'personal reasons'
items.dek: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.
items.body: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Alleged Scattered Spider hacker arrested in Finland
items.dek: The 19-year-old dual American-Estonian national has been extradited to the US, where he is facing federal charges.
items.body: The 19-year-old dual American-Estonian national has been extradited to the US, where he is facing federal charges.
